name: Ai-Media Technologies Limited
analysis: AIM has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 75% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2400, stop A$0.1930, target A$0.2650 (0.53:1) — then trail it.
